title: Property Tests, Algebraic Laws, and Pipeline Diagnostics · Pipeline Brief: Pipeline Observability
summary: Prove a normalization and aggregation library across generated changed cases and injected faults. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp pipeline observability increment in a law-oriented regression and diagnostics suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Attach diagnostic taps at effect boundaries without changing transformed values.
Test identity, associativity, idempotence, or round-trip laws only where contracts claim them.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
